mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO bill_usage_record ( id, tenant_id, metric_type, usage_value, record_date, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version ) VALUES
( #{record.id}, #{record.tenantId}, #{record.metricType}, #{record.usageValue}, #{record.recordDate}, #{record.createdBy}, #{record.createdTime}, #{record.updatedBy}, #{record.updatedTime}, #{record.deleted}, #{record.version} )
ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, metric_type, record_date) WHERE deleted = FALSE DO UPDATE SET usage_value = EXCLUDED.usage_value, updated_by = EXCLUDED.updated_by, updated_time = EXCLUDED.updated_time, version = bill_usage_record.version + 1
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT tenant_id) FROM sys_login_log WHERE status = 1 AND login_time >= CURRENT_DATE - (#{recentDays} - 1) * INTERVAL '1 day' AND deleted = FALSE

SELECT CAST(login_time AS DATE) AS date, COUNT(DISTINCT username)::BIGINT AS count FROM sys_login_log WHERE status = 1 AND login_time >= CURRENT_DATE - (#{recentDays} - 1) * INTERVAL '1 day' AND deleted = FALSE GROUP BY CAST(login_time AS DATE) ORDER BY CAST(login_time AS DATE) DESC
SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(file_size)::numeric / 1048576, 2), 0) FROM sys_file WHERE deleted = FALSE
SELECT COUNT(*)::BIGINT FROM sys_operation_log WHERE created_time >= CURRENT_DATE AND created_time < CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day' AND deleted = FALSE

SELECT t.id AS tenantId, t.name AS tenantName, NULL::TIMESTAMP AS expireTime, COALESCE(u.user_count, 0) AS userCount, COALESCE(s.storage_mb, 0) AS storageMb, COALESCE(a.api_calls_total, 0) AS apiCallsTotal, COALESCE(l.login_count_last30d, 0) AS loginCountLast30d, FALSE AS isExpiringSoon FROM sys_tenant t LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tenant_id, COUNT(*)::BIGINT AS user_count FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = FALSE GROUP BY tenant_id ) u ON t.id = u.tenant_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tenant_id, COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(file_size)::numeric / 1048576, 2), 0) AS storage_mb FROM sys_file WHERE deleted = FALSE GROUP BY tenant_id ) s ON t.id = s.tenant_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tenant_id, COUNT(*)::BIGINT AS api_calls_total FROM sys_operation_log WHERE created_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '29 days' AND deleted = FALSE GROUP BY tenant_id ) a ON t.id = a.tenant_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tenant_id, COUNT(*)::BIGINT AS login_count_last30d FROM sys_login_log WHERE status = 1 AND login_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '29 days' AND deleted = FALSE GROUP BY tenant_id ) l ON t.id = l.tenant_id WHERE t.deleted = FALSE ORDER BY t.id
